name: PayPal
description: Send and receive money, pay online, and manage your balance. Widely accepted for personal transfers and business payments.

name: Revolut
description: All-in-one finance app with multi-currency accounts, stock trading, crypto, and budgeting. Free tier with interbank exchange rates and instant payments.

name: Stripe
description: Developer-first payment processing platform. Accept cards, bank transfers, and 100+ payment methods globally. Powers millions of businesses from startups to Fortune 500.

name: Wise
description: International money transfers at real exchange rates. Send money abroad with fees up to 8x cheaper than banks. Multi-currency accounts and debit card included.
